requirement_topic.en: Labelling & Instructions — EN 149 Wording, In-country Importer, English and Local Safety Information
requirement_topic.zh: 标签与说明书 — EN 149表述、在地进口商、英文及安全信息
requirement_topic.zht: 標籤與說明書 — EN 149表述、在地進口商、英文及安全信息

summary.en: Kenya-bound respirators must include user information and labels in at least English, with product-specific EN 149 class, intended-use limits, donning instructions, maintenance and single-use/reusable status, shelf life, and storage details on packaging and direct product marking. The in-country importer/distributor should be identified as the market-placement party for customs and recall traceability. Importers should avoid clinical or surgical claims in this KEBS route, and mark the product for 240 V and 50 Hz where electrical characteristics are part of the declaration.
summary.zh: 进出口肯尼亚的呼吸器须至少使用英文提供标签与说明书，内容包括EN 149等级、使用范围、佩戴方法、保养与一次性/可重复使用状态、保质期与储存条件等，应用于包装和产品本体。需标注肯尼亚境内进口商/经销商作为市场投放主体，方便海关和召回追踪。使用KEBS路线时应避免临床或外科相关医疗声明，并在含电信息声明中体现240 V与50 Hz。
summary.zht: 進出口肯亞的呼吸器須至少使用英文提供標籤與說明書，內容包括EN 149等級、使用範圍、佩戴方法、保養與一次性/可重複使用狀態、保質期與儲存條件等，用於包裝和產品本體。需標註肯亞境內進口商／經銷商作為市場投放主體，方便海關和召回追蹤。使用KEBS路線時應避免臨床或外科相關醫療聲明，並在含電資訊聲明中體現240 V與50 Hz。

standards_or_laws: Kenya Standard adopting EN 149 — user information content and markings
KEBS PVoC importer and release-role documentation requirements
Product safety declaration elements normally required by EN 149-conformant paths
Electric declaration consistency with Kenyan 240 V, 50 Hz conditions where applicable

summary.en: GB 2626 documentation usually provides Chinese-language information and domestic product claims in KN-class terms. This does not satisfy the Kenya import-labeling expectation where English information and importer traceability are expected for market and customs records.
summary.zh: GB 2626技术资料通常采用中文说明，采用KN等级术语和国内销售用途表述。该文本体系不能满足肯尼亚进口标签要求，后者要求英文信息并体现境内进口商责任主体，便于海关与监管记录。
summary.zht: GB 2626技術資料通常採用中文說明，採用KN等級術語和國內銷售用途表述。該文本體系不能滿足肯亞進口標籤要求，後者要求英文資訊並體現境內進口商責任主體，便於海關與監管記錄。

standards_or_laws: GB 2626-2019 — domestic marking and instruction language regime in China
CNCA/CNRA domestic inspection and certification framework

gap.en: The main label/documentation gap is localisation. Exporters must convert instructions into English, align product claims to the KEBS pathway, and provide importer details. If voltage specifications are declared, they must reflect Kenya's 240 V and 50 Hz context rather than exporting a 220/380-only declaration. CE wording is irrelevant to this pathway unless re-used for other markets.
gap.zh: 主要差距在于标签文本本地化。出口商必须将说明书转换为英文，按KEBS路径对齐产品声明，并提供进口商信息。如有电压声明，应按肯尼亚240 V、50 Hz实际背景书写，不应仅写220/380。该路径与CE说法并不相关，除非用于其他市场并另行适配。
gap.zht: 主要差距在於標籤文本在地化。出口商必須將說明書轉換為英文，按KEBS路徑對齊產品聲明，並提供進口商資訊。如有電壓聲明，應按肯亞240 V、50 Hz實際背景撰寫，不應僅寫220/380。該路徑與CE說法並不相關，除非用於其他市場並另行適配。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — English language labelling and importer identification are required in Kenya; voltage/power declaration must match destination requirements
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — Chinese-language domestic labelling accepted for local Chinese market under GB 2626 practice

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] For Kenya import, labels and instructions should be presented for the KEBS pathway in English and include importer traceability and 240 V / 50 Hz electrical declaration where applicable. CN 220/380-only or KN-class-only wording without route alignment is likely to be challenged.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 对肯尼亚进口而言，标签与说明书应按KEBS路径使用英文并包含进口商追溯信息及必要的240 V / 50 Hz声明。仅有中文或CN KN级别表述且未对齐KEBS路径的材料容易在口岸受阻。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 對肯亞進口而言，標籤與說明書應按KEBS路徑使用英文並包含進口商追溯資訊及必要的240 V / 50 Hz聲明。僅有中文或CN KN級別表述且未對齊KEBS路徑的材料容易在口岸受阻。
